_comment: Copy this file to sap_config.json and fill in your SAP MS1 details. For security, prefer leaving 'passwd' out of this file and setting the SAP_PASSWD environment variable instead. Any SAP_* environment variable overrides the value here.
_load_balanced_alternative: Instead of ashost/sysnr you may use a message server: set mshost, msserv, group and sysid.
